title: DDecadent Flax-seedy Jamaican Skewers
description: A sweet, snappy and energizing jain-friendly dish featuring flaxseed, brine-dried on a binchotan grill for an unforgettable breakfast or snack.

ingredients.name: Sweetener of choice (honey, maple syrup, etc.)
Fresh herbs (optional)
ingredients.amount: A few sprigs of cilantro or parsley

instructions: Soak flaxseeds in brine solution for at least 2 hours.
Toss soaked flaxseeds with sweetener and lime juice.
Thread mixture onto skewers, ensuring a mix of flavors and textures.
Grill on banchotan grill at medium-high heat until golden brown and crispy, about 8 minutes per side.
Garnish with fresh herbs if desired.
